name: custom/ga4-itemid-fix
description: Theme-independent GA4 Item-ID Fix: replaces Shopware UUIDs with product numbers (SKU) in Shopware built-in analytics (GA4).

label.en-GB: GA4 Item-ID Fix (SKU instead of UUID)

description.de-DE: Theme-unabhängig: ersetzt Shopware-UUIDs durch Artikelnummern (SKU) in GA4 Events (integriertes Shopware Analytics).
description.en-GB: Theme-independent: replaces Shopware UUIDs with product numbers (SKU) in GA4 events (Shopware built-in analytics).
